subject: iPhone storage full — cannot update apps
description: User sees 'Not Enough Storage' when trying to update apps or take photos; phone feels slow.

ts_steps.title: Review storage breakdown
ts_steps.action: Settings → General → iPhone Storage — wait for bar to load; review list sorted by size and note largest apps or 'Other/System Data'.

ts_steps.title: Offload unused apps
ts_steps.action: Tap an unused large app → Offload App (keeps data, frees binary). For media-heavy apps like Photos, enable iCloud Photos or transfer to PC.

ts_steps.title: Clear Safari and Messages data
ts_steps.action: Settings → Safari → Clear History and Website Data; Settings → Messages → Keep Messages → 1 Year or 30 Days to auto-delete old threads.

internal_information: System Data bloat is common after multiple OTA updates; a backup-and-restore can reclaim space. Large 'Other' category may also be streaming caches from Music or Podcasts.
